M0660_CU_DRESS_LOW (M0660) Current Ability to Dress Lower Body Current ability to dress lower body. 00 = Able to obtain, put on, and remove clothing and shoes without assistance
01 = Able to dress lower body without assistance if clothing and shoes are laid out or handed to the patient
